description: Textured leather monk strap shoes from provogue for men with a refined, stacked heel. For the debonair who pushes the sartorial envelope or sticks to classic styling per his mood. Style this piece with flat front trousers, a tonal blazer and a crisp shirt, or with double pleated trousers, a blazer with a peaked lapel and a dress shirt. Upper Leather upper with reinforced overlay on the midfoot and heel Aggressive stitch detailing on the seams of the midfoot overlay Slip on styling with elasticated inserts on the sides of the tongue for ease of wearability Steel link strap across the midfoot with a mock tang clasp Soft sockliner for instep comfort Brand badge on the lateral side of the midfoot Midsole Shock absorbing EVA midsole Outsole TPR outsole with a stacked heel Textured grooves on the forefoot and midfoot for grip and traction Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
